title: Kharik Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kharik with a Z-Score of +3.86. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Kharik are extremely hot, with a high Z-Score indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with a CDD of 12.5 GG and humidity at 78%. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 10.2 km/h, but it will not provide much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Kharik.
